lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: Hello, Bwana, what can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me a bit about this place?

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: Of course, Bwana. You look like a traveler!

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: Well, I am a traveller myself, and I have set up this hostel for adventurers and travellers who are weary from their journey.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: There is a dormitory upstairs if you are tired. It costs 35 coins, which covers the costs of laundry and cleaning.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: I'm afraid you do not have enough money for that, Bwana.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: I'm afraid you do not have enough money for that, Bwana.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: I'm afraid you do not have enough money for that, Bwana.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: I'm afraid you do not have enough money for that, Bwana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: Sorry, Bwana, I don't do that kind of thing anymore. You should go and talk to Pirate Jackie in Brimhaven instead. Can I help with anything else?

sections.title: Talking to Kaleb Paramaya before completing Shilo Village

lines.speaker: Kaleb Paramaya
lines.text: I'm getting out of here Bwana, the place is infested with zombies.
